rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Ramine Etow
rule_metadata.title: Phishing Redirector

rules.rule_text:
title: Phishing Redirector
id: 3dc81d88-6d9c-4c86-bc5d-ff743d50dbee
description: URL pattern seen in multiple successful phishing attacks in the last
  few days. This phishing redirector has been observed to be deployed on compromised
  websites. If the user passes the antibot checks, they are redirected to a MITM phishing
  proxy (EvilProxy). If the phish is successful, you should see authentication attempts
  from the phishing proxy IP address in Azure AD / Entra ID logs.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Ramine Etow
date: '2024-08-13'
modified: '2024-08-13'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri-query|startswith: classic=
    c-uri-query|re: ^classic=[A-Za-z0-9]{10,}
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- User may have opened phishing lure without entering any credentials. Look for suspicious
  authentication attempts
level: high
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
